name: Keep a change minimal
when_to_use: Mid-change: write, reuse, or subtract while coding, before finishing

name: Audit and score existing code
when_to_use: Audit existing code or a repo for slop and parallel-readiness, then score it

name: Shape boundaries, refactor, or explain
when_to_use: Plan right-sized boundaries and work-partitioning, sequence a refactor, or explain a principle
